chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-6068 of 2024 -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Date: Order with signature of the Judge -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- For orders as to maintainability. 16.12.2024 Mr. Yousuf Ali, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Fahim Raza Khuhro, advocate for respondent Nos.2 & 3. Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General. Admittedly, the impugned order has been remanded back for adjudication to the Commissioner I.R. for expeditious disposal. Learned counsel for the department states that pending adjudication as aforesaid, no coercive action shall be taken against the petitioner. Learned counsel for the petitioner states that under such circumstances, the petition has served its purpose and may be disposed of. Order accordingly. Judge Judge M. Khan
